articles.title: Choi Woo-shik and Mun Ka-young Team Up for New Drama

articles.title: Fred Again Officially Confirms Debut India Tour
articles.summary: Following a series of viral newspaper ads featuring the word “again,” the UK producer has finally confirmed his highly anticipated three-city India tour, with shows in Delhi NCR, Mumbai and Bengaluru this December.
